name: Futadom Academy V2
description:
Futanari Academy, my attempt to make a sandbox, NSFW, roleplay set at a finishing school/college in the futadom world setting. Where males and females are expected to be little more than subservient cocksleeves for futanari characters, often by force. Your character has been sent to the academy, you may choose if you're male, futa, or female.

The original was one of the first and most popular bots I've ever made, people seemed to like it, but since then I've learned a lot about setting up bots and wanna see if I can make a better one.... however, I don't wanna screw up the old one, so v2 was born.

V3: https://janitorai.com/characters/26babaa1-ad0a-436c-be2e-73a824138d51_character-futadom-academy-v-3
